Now,  therefore,  in  consideration  of  these  premises,  and  other  good  and  valuable consideration,  the  receipt  and  sufficiency  of  which  consideration  is  hereby  acknowledged,  the  recipient covenants and agrees with the receiver as follows:
Definitions
"affiliate"  means,  as  to  any  person,
"confidential information" means:
All data and information, in whatever form communicated or maintained, whether orally,
All plans, proposals, reports, analyses, notes, studies, forecasts,
The existence and terms of this agreement and any other agreements related to a possible transaction;
The fact that information has been disclosed or made available to the recipient or the recipient's representatives;
The fact that discussions or negotiations are or may be taking place with respect to  a  possible  transaction,
Is  available  to  the  recipient  or  the  recipient's  representatives  on  a  non- confidential basis from a source other than the receiver,
Is  at  the  time  of  disclosure  known  to  the  recipient  or  thereafter  becomes generally  available  to  the  public,
"definitive  agreement" means a binding definitive  written  agreement to consummate a transaction;
"party"  means  a  party  to  this  agreement  and  "parties"  means  all  parties  to  this agreement;
"permitted purpose" shall have the meaning set out in recital c;
"person"  is  to  be  broadly  interpreted  to  include  any  individual,
"representatives" means, in respect of a party, such party’s agents,
"transaction" shall have the meaning set out in recital b.
As  a  condition  to  receiving  the  confidential  information,
The confidential information shall remain at all times the property of the company.
The  recipient  shall  comply  with  the  canada  personal  information  protection  and electronic  documents  act,
Prior to the closing of the transaction (the "closing"), the recipient shall:
If the transaction proceeds, following the closing, the recipient shall,
In  accepting  and  reviewing  the  confidential  information,
The  recipient  agrees  that,
This agreement will continue indefinitely, unless otherwise agreed in writing by the receiver.
Business sale non disclosure agreement
That the confidential information shall comprise all information (in whatever form, including written,
To keep the confidential information secret at all times
Not to use the confidential information in whole or in part,
To reveal the confidential information only to those of your employees or third party advisers who need to know in connection with our discussions relating to the proposed transaction.
To take all proper and reasonable measures to ensure the confidentiality and security of the confidential information at all times.
To acknowledge that the property and copyright in the confidential information belongs to us and that no licence or any other right is granted to you in respect of the confidential information.

To destroy immediately on our written request all confidential information in your possession including any copies made (save where we are required pursuant to some law or enactment or regulation or the rules of any stock exchange to retain originals or copies of any of the confidential information).
That we are not required or obliged to disclose any information of any kind to you.
That no warranty or representation, whether express or implied,
That this agreement does not create any right enforceable by any person who is not a party to it and that the contracts (right of third parties) act 1999 as amended shall not apply.
That this agreement does not oblige or imply any obligation on either party to enter into any transaction or further agreement.
That this agreement may only be modified or waived by a separate written agreement between the parties which specifically and expressly modifies or waives this agreement or part of it.

That this agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the law of england and wales and the courts of england and wales shall have exclusive jurisdiction to settle any dispute or claim that arises out of or in connection with it or its subject matter or formation (including non-contractual disputes or claims)

That in the event of any term of this agreement being held to be illegal or unenforceable either in whole or in part that term shall be deemed not to be part of this agreement but the enforceability of the remainder shall be unaffected.

That any notices under this agreement shall be sent by first-class prepaid post to the address of the recipient party as set out in this letter and shall be deemed to have been received on the second week day (that is,
That the provisions of this agreement shall last for the duration of the discussions relating to the proposed transaction and for 2 years following their conclusion.
That these terms shall not apply where the confidential information:
Is required to be disclosed pursuant to any legal, statutory or regulatory requirement.
Confidentiality agreement 1
Confidentiality agreement
The parties maintain a supply relationship. in the frame of this cooperation,
The contract parties are obligated to preclude disclosure of confidential information to third parties.
All confidential information remains the property of the disclosing contract party.
The receiving party was already aware of or which was developed by the disclosing party itself independent of the disclosure,
Is publicly known without this agreement having been broken,
Was received by a third party without infringement of this or any other confidentiality agreement.
If the recipient is forced to expose the confidential information due to a legal regulation,
The confidential information will be provided as is.

Mutual non-disclosure/confidentiality agreement this agreement effective the day of , 2013.
The  confidential,
The term confidential information shall not include information, which is:
In the public domain other than by a breach of this agreement by the receiving party;
Rightfully received from a third party with no duty of confidentiality; or
Rightfully known to the receiving party without any limitation on use or disclosure prior to its receipt from the disclosing party;
Independently developed by employees, agents or consultants of the receiving party; or
Generally  made  available  to  third  parties  by  the  disclosing  party  without  restriction  on disclosure.
This agreement will be effective as of the date of this agreement,

Time shall be of the essence in this agreement.
